title: Nuage Active Hands Tough Hand Cream for Extremely Dry, Cracked Skin | Fast-Absorbing, Non-Greasy Formula | Intense Moisturiser for Hardworking Hands (150g)

features: INTENSIVE CARE FOR HARDWORKING HANDS: This tough hand cream is specially formulated for extremely dry and cracked skin. Ideal after gardening, DIY, or outdoor work, it hydrates deeply to restore comfort and flexibility.
FAST-ABSORBING & NON-GREASY: Designed with a quick-absorbing formula, this moisturising cream sinks in quickly without leaving hands sticky. Great for use during busy days or before bed.
SOOTHES CRACKED & ROUGH SKIN: Helps repair cracked knuckles, rough fingertips, and dry patches. Use after exposure to wind, cold weather, or frequent washing to soothe and soften.
PERFECT FOR DAILY USE: Gentle enough to be used throughout the day, yet powerful enough to treat tough skin. Keep it on a desk, in a toolbox, or next to the kitchen sink for regular use.
IDEAL HAND CREAM FOR MEN AND WOMEN: With a neutral scent and powerful performance, this cream is loved by both men and women. A great choice for households with multiple users.
GREAT SIZE FOR HOME & WORK: The generous 150g tub offers long-lasting value. Keep one in the workshop or bathroom to ensure hands stay smooth, soft, and cared for all year round.
description: Product Description Designed for hardworking hands, Nuage Active Hands Tough Hand Cream delivers serious care for skin that needs extra attention. This rich, fast-absorbing moisturising cream is perfect for anyone struggling with extremely dry, rough, or cracked skin. Whether it’s the result of outdoor work, daily handwashing, or exposure to cold weather, this intensive hand cream deeply hydrates and soothes without leaving a greasy residue. Packed into a generous 150g tub, it’s ideal for keeping by the sink, in the shed, or at a bedside table. With its powerful yet gentle formula, it’s suitable for all skin types and makes a thoughtful addition to any hand cream gift set. Ideal as a moisturising cream for men and women, it offers the perfect blend of care and comfort for skin that works hard. Whether bought as a daily essential or a gift for a loved one, this is the hand cream that truly delivers results. Ingredients Aqua, Stearic Acid, Petrolatum, Glycerin, Paraffin, Ethylhexyl Stearate, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Glyceryl Stearate, Paraffinum Liquidum, Polysorbate 80, Phenoxyethanol, Carbomer, Hydroxyacetophenone, Sodium Hydroxide, Hydroxpropyl Methylcellulose, Allantoin, Sodium Benzoate, Tocopheryl (Vitamin E) Acetate, Ethylhexylglycerin. Directions Using a small amount, rub into hands as required. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If eye contact occurs rinse thoroughly with water. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
